prompt:
You are assisting with a governed QMS (quality management system) change.

# Engineering brief — ...
deliverables: Working implementation aligned to approved scope
Cannot close without satisfying required signatures and task completion rules.
warnings: Do not run autonomous agents against production from this payload.

acceptanceCriteria: Audit logs / agent run logs remain coherent after changes.
moduleAntiPatterns: Closing CAPA without effectiveness evidence (unless governed waiver is implemented).
